programme.title: Meenakshi Amman - The Marvel of Madurai
programme.desc: The filmmaker celebrates the legend of Meenakshi Amman, a goddess, queen and patron deity of the archaic city of Madurai.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After picking up a simple coin-operated carousel, Jarrett ends up going in circles when the buyer calls en-route with other loads that need hauling.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers have their worlds rocked in Garden Grove, where Ivy learns surprising uses for office equipment and Lisa finds the shiniest bowl she has ever laid eyes upon.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: When Barry hears that the big whales are coming to town, he decides to take Dusty under his wing in order to determine how much profit he can make.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Alana returns home to Mildura. Meanwhile, Scotty shares his creative side in Melbourne, before continuing his trip through the Kimberley.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After Jenn attempts to drive a decked-out armored assault vehicle to its buyer, the ride turns out to be little more than she bargained for.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers have their worlds rocked in Garden Grove, where Ivy learns surprising uses for office equipment and Lisa finds the shiniest bowl she has ever laid eyes upon.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: When Barry hears that the big whales are coming to town, he decides to take Dusty under his wing in order to determine how much profit he can make.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Discover the nuances of dance and fight in the skilled moves of a Silambam artist from Chennai and later, meet the only authorised taxidermist from Mumbai, Dr. Santosh Gaikwad.

programme.title: Special Operations: India Pathankot
programme.desc: A special operations team is deployed to deal with a terror plot to attack a vital Indian Air Force base in Pathankot, Punjab.

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries behind the Sun temple at Modhera, the temple of Brihadeeswara, and the unexplained rock cut wonders of Unakoti.

programme.title: The Einstein Challenge
programme.desc: Two inquisitive physicist explore the concept of thermodynamics and extreme altitude by wading through questions regarding parachutes and diving.

programme.title: Born to Be Wild
programme.desc: Two doctors, Ferdinand Recio and Nielsen Donato, study wildlife of the Philippines. They visit several places and check on various species.

programme.title: Nature Gone Wild
programme.desc: A seal discovers an eight-legged weapon, a dog comes to the rescue of a drowning deer and a town starts to crumble into the sea.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: At Clay Spencer Blacksmith shop, three skilled smiths face off in a heated competition. Subsequently, through gruelling challenges, they showcase their mastery of the forge.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Meet an illusion artist from Uttar Pradesh who left her corporate job to nurture her passion and an instructor from Haryana who can perform yoga underwater.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: When Barry hears that the big whales are coming to town, he decides to take Dusty under his wing in order to determine how much profit he can make.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny has a potential customer who is ready to purchase the 1967 Ford Bronco he's restoring. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli get even at a gun range. Later, Danny checks out a 1980 fire truck.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: Jess and the team reunite in Jaisalmer to experience quintessential Rajasthan, riding across the iconic dunes of the Thar Desert.

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: Look into the many prison escapes of James Earl Ray, a notorious escape artist and assassin who killed Martin Luther King Junior.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and Pops drop by on their way home from holiday and end up schooling the other buyers. Meanwhile, Brandi and Cameron almost take their profits sky-high.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene acquires lukewarm results bobbing for profits in Stanton. Meanwhile, Dusty finds a hoard of quality equipment, inking himself a decent payday.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the bizarre things that have fallen from the sky, such as meteorites, seafood and much more.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the bizarre things that have fallen from the sky, such as meteorites, seafood and much more.

credits.actor: Dan Aykroyd,Adam Richman,Hakeem Oluseyi,Mitch Horowitz,Don Wildman,Martin K.A. Morgan

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: In the absence of humans, the deserts which were once subdued will return to reclaim great victories, from the shimmering lights of Las Vegas to the towering glory of Dubai's Burj Khalifa.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The hosts recycle and transform forgotten relics, old electronics and vehicles into beautiful collectibles while meeting other collectors.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After Jenn attempts to drive a decked-out armored assault vehicle to its buyer, the ride turns out to be little more than she bargained for.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: Rick negotiates with a BMX stunt rider who brings in his 1976 Evel Knievel Junior Roadmaster bike, offering a discount if the client gives a daring performance.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny needs to restore a boat-tail Riviera to be the main attraction at his upcoming car show. Later, his hunt for a gasser leads him to a stunning collection of jaw-dropping vehicles.

programme.title: The Food That Built the World
programme.desc: In the mid-20th century, two unlikely characters compete to simplify the lives of homemakers across the USA by creating a tasty and easy-to-make boxed cake mix.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases wondrous octopuses that can edit their own genetic material and jellyfish that can live forever.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: The host speaks to the cousin of the king of Jodhpur, who lives in his own palace. Afterwards, she resumes her quest for authentic recipes with the city's top chefs.

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: A compilation of the best episodes of 'OMG! Yeh Mera India', wherein the host sheds light on several inspiring and exciting stories from across India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: A Nepalese kukri, a 100-year-old barong and a hand-forged falcata are among the knives competitors use to come out on top.

programme.title: Born to be Wild
programme.desc: Andrew travels to South America, where he spends a month living alone in the Amazon rainforest of Peru in order to find as many animals as he can.

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: Tour D' Royale
programme.desc: The filmmaker takes a deep dive into the rich culture and heritage of Rajasthan and Gujarat by visiting luxurious palaces and mansions.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the strangest experiments witnessed by time like hypnotized assassins, monkey glands for immortality and a brain-linked cyborg couple.

programme.title: Mahakaleshwar: Legends of Shiva
programme.desc: The host sheds light on the legends and rituals surrounding the Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga and its association with Mahakala, a manifestation of Shiva.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: After Jenn attempts to drive a decked-out armored assault vehicle to its buyer, the ride turns out to be little more than she bargained for.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.desc: Ivy and Pops drop by on their way home from holiday and end up schooling the other buyers. Meanwhile, Brandi and Cameron almost take their profits sky-high.

programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene acquires lukewarm results bobbing for profits in Stanton. Meanwhile, Dusty finds a hoard of quality equipment, inking himself a decent payday.

programme.title: A Taste of Travel
programme.desc: Scotty checks out what the Kimberley has on offer as Alana travels to Bucharest, Romania. Meanwhile, Skye samples a Vietnamese treat in the Barossa.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The prodigal smiths of New Agrarian School in Bigfork, Montana are put to a gruelling challenge in order to prove their mettle and win a grand prize.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn's expensive shipment of prayer gongs almost misses its buyer and Jarrett's load is delayed by a day during a side job in Las Vegas.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.desc: Ivy and Pops drop by on their way home from holiday and end up schooling the other buyers. Meanwhile, Brandi and Cameron almost take their profits sky-high.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

programme.desc: Rene acquires lukewarm results bobbing for profits in Stanton. Meanwhile, Dusty finds a hoard of quality equipment, inking himself a decent payday.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Meet Sanjana, a young sensation from Chennai who is an exceptional talent in archery. Also, discover the determination in this cancer survivor who is India's leading sport climber.

programme.title: Firepower: Defending India
programme.desc: Helicopters and Special Force Commandos demonstrate an extraction, tanks and combat vehicles overcome water obstacles and army engineers construct a floating bridge.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Del Bryant wants to pay tribute to his Tennessee roots by customising his Blazer. Meanwhile, Mike and Ryan check out a super rare 1963 Oldsmobile.

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries
programme.desc: Gujarat's lost city of Dholavira reveals strange symbols while the powerful words of Buddha, spoken over two millennia ago, still resonate from Sarnath.

programme.title: The Einstein Challenge
programme.desc: Expert historians bring ancient warfare to life through hands-on demonstrations wherein they showcase formidable weapons such as the trebuchet, hwacha and Greek fire.

programme.title: Food Tech
programme.desc: Discover the secret behind a fluffy pancake and other dishes as Bobby Bognar enjoys a hearty breakfast in the United States.

programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: The filmmaker sets on a fast-paced journey to look into the pasts of legendary companies to fascinating subjects like UFOs and the daily lives of billionaires.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Top bladesmiths from different walks of life compete to create the best weapons and prove their effectiveness in a series of daunting challenges.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: Meet the determined phillumenist of India who showcases an impressive collection of matchboxes with unique stories behind them. Also, connect with an impressive adventurer from Rishikesh.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene acquires lukewarm results bobbing for profits in Stanton. Meanwhile, Dusty finds a hoard of quality equipment, inking himself a decent payday.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned to craft a commemorative bike honouring musician Les Paul. Later, Mike scouts out a 1940 Dodge to stun Danny. Meanwhile, Danny and Kevin admire a 1964 Galaxie.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

credits.actor: Corey Harrison,Rick Harrison,Austin Chumlee Russell,Richard Harrison

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: Jess and the crew continue to explore the wonders of Jaipur, uncovering more cultural treasures and reunite with Pulak for the final stretch to Delhi.

programme.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programme.desc: The host meets Ritwik Bhattacharya, a five-time National Squash Champion who has established the START Academy in Kalote-Mokashi, a village in Maharashtra.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: Renowned actor and host Morgan Freeman revisits some of the most daring jailbreaks conducted by ingenuous prisoners from across the globe.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: At a large estate sale in Canyon Country, Dave challenges the existence of wise youth. Meanwhile, Brandi claims her spot.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene goes big while Ivy stumbles across an antique of unusual origin. Darrell grabs a smaller unit but realises good things come in petite packages.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Elite bladesmiths gather at Texarkana's Bill Moran School, America's oldest bladesmithing institution where the three top artisans face gruelling trials, pushing their craft to extremes.

credits.actor: Grady Powell,J. Neilson,Doug Marcaida,David Baker,Ben Abbott

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the existence of serpent Gods in the religious traditions of several places in the Asian and South American regions.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys go big at a major soft drink bottling plant in Texas. Later, tough negotiations occur at a 50,000-square-foot warehouse.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn's expensive shipment of prayer gongs almost misses its buyer and Jarrett's load is delayed by a day during a side job in Las Vegas.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick evaluates Eddie Van Halen sneakers and a rigged roulette wheel, while Corey examines a sterling silver mint julep cup and Chum inspects a Louis Vuitton jacket.

programme.title: Kings of Restoration
programme.desc: David Copperfield, the illusionist, phones the store with two restoration requests for items in his museum's collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Del Bryant wants to pay tribute to his Tennessee roots by customising his Blazer. Meanwhile, Mike and Ryan check out a super rare 1963 Oldsmobile.

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, the ingenious inventors of Uno and Connect Four risk everything they have in order to bring revolutionary shift to classic games.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: When Spanish Conquistadors obliterated the historical record of the Maya in the 16th century, they possibly wiped out evidence that ancient people travelled to America.

credits.actor: Robert Clotworthy,Giorgio A. Tsoukalos,Erich von Däniken,David Childress,William Henry,Linda Moulton Howe,David Wilcock,Jonathan Young,Jason Martell

programme.title: Royal India with Samira
programme.desc: The host visits the Bal Samand Lake Palace, an age-old summer retreat of the Jodhpur kings. There, she cooks delicious dishes and goes for a ride in a 200-year-old horse-drawn carriage.

programme.title: Omg! Yeh Mera India Classics
programme.desc: Amandeep Singh, also known as Steel Man, is a special individual from Kurukshetra, Haryana whose ability to endure pain is unparallel.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programme.desc: A competitor, when faced with the Viking Seax, tries to prove the curved Egyptian Khosephand can thrive in the obstacle course. Later, the two finalists compete in the Dead Run.

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Does Everyone Hate the British Empire?
programme.desc: Chris Daley uncovers the real story of the pirates of the Caribbean and Al works on on a sugarcane plantation in order to get a taste of the exploitation that boosted Scotland's economy.

programme.title: India: Marvels \u0026 Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to uncover previously unknown information about its ancient civilisation.

programme.title: Roads Unknown: India
programme.desc: The ride takes a dramatic turn when Bhaskar totals the support car. With Ridermania just days away, Jess and the team scramble to salvage their journey.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Dan Aykroyd explores the fascinating world of wondrous beasts and bizarre architecture that lies just beneath the surface of Earth.

programme.title: Kumbh: Among the Seekers
programme.desc: The filmmaker showcases the Kumbh Mela in India and shines a light on the many elements, both human and technical, that create this unique experience.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jenn's expensive shipment of prayer gongs almost misses its buyer and Jarrett's load is delayed by a day during a side job in Las Vegas.

credits.actor: Marc Springer,Jennifer Brennan,Jarrett Joyce,Christopher Hanna,Robbie Welsh,Dusty Davie,Todd Sturgis,Tamera Sturgis,Jessica Samko

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: At a large estate sale in Canyon Country, Dave challenges the existence of wise youth. Meanwhile, Brandi claims her spot.

credits.actor: Darrell Sheets,Brandi Passante,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Barry Weiss,Ivy Calvin,Ivy Calvin Jr.,Isaiah Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Kenny Crossley,Lisa DeLarios,Dusty Riach,Thom Beers
